{{Infobox construct
| name = Thousand-Mile Cloud
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Thousand-Mile Cloud Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A Thousand-Mile [[Cloud]] is a versatile transportation [[construct]] used by [[sacred artists]] for travel and mobility. These objects consist of densely packed cloud madra and are typically controlled via a [[script-circle]] at their core. Rather than following fixed directions, the cloud follows the movement of the operator's spirit, acting as an obedient tool that can be guided through a trickle of [[madra]]. While they are relatively simple to [[construct]], their effectiveness depends on the user's power; for instance, those without [[madra]] cannot utilize them, and a user's spirit level can influence their speed and distance. These constructs vary significantly in appearance, color, and scale. They can appear as small, personal mounts or as massive, [[island]]-sized platforms capable of supporting entire buildings, houses, or even small cities. They are found in various colors, including red, blue, gold, green, purple, and white. In certain regions, such as the [[Ninecloud Country]], they are naturally occurring and can reach immense proportions. The Thousand-Mile [[Cloud]] serves several roles in society. They are common tools for civilian travel, but they also serve as significant military and political assets. The [[Skysworn]] utilize specific [[emerald]] green clouds as symbols of their status, and they employ massive cloud fortresses—essentially flying cities like [[Stormrock]]—for permanent habitation and headquarters. Additionally, specialized versions exist for high-speed travel or as part of larger cloudships used by various sects and clans.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] uses her spirit to power the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to escape.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18">''Unsouled'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a valuable transportation item that can be powered by [[Lindon's madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a mount [[Lindon]] uses.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a [[construct]] that [[Lindon]] uses to drift.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The Thousand-Mile [[Cloud]] is a horse-sized, opaque red [[construct]] composed of densely packed [[Forged]] cloud madra and wisps of [[essence]]. Activated by a single [[script-circle]] at its core, this rust-colored object serves as a method of flight that [[Lindon]] can summon and control via a leash of thin [[madra]]. Beyond its use for travel, the cloud functions as a transport capable of carrying packs and is an item that can be traded. During its journey, the cloud was positioned a week away from the [[Ancestor's Tomb]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a horse-sized pillow of opaque red fog.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a rust-colored cloud that [[Lindon]] uses to travel.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a dense red cloud with wisps of [[essence]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a [[construct]] that uses [[Forged]] cloud madra.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a thing that can be traded.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is an object that follows [[Lindon]] on a leash of thin [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is made of densely packed cloud madra and can be activated by a single [[script-circle]] at its core.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c10">''Soulsmith'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is red.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a method of flight [[Lindon]] mentioned.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is an object that can be summoned.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a [[construct]] that can carry packs.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a week away from the [[Ancestor's Tomb]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A Thousand-Mile [[Cloud]] is a type of flying mount capable of carrying the weight of two buildings. [[Lindon]] possesses a red specimen that drifts behind him, which he keeps stored inside a polished chest made of [[jade]] and wood. During the events at the cliff, a dark blue cloud is seen passing over the edge. Ultimately, this [[construct]] is seized by [[Eithan]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is large enough to carry two buildings.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]]'s [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is kept in a polished wood-and-[[jade]] chest.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Thousand-Mile Clouds are flying creatures or mounts.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has a red [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] drifting behind him.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A dark blue [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] passed over the cliff.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a [[construct]] seized by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Originally utilized as a method of flight by [[Jai Daishou]], the Thousand-Mile [[Cloud]] serves as the foundation for [[Sky's Mercy]]. These deep blue clouds are used by [[sacred artists]] to travel through the sky, and they were once employed by the [[Skysworn]] to carry people. While [[Renfei]] keeps a Thousand-Mile [[Cloud]] preserved within her armor, Pai Ren utilizes a personal version for flight. During these events, a [[Skysworn woman]] is seen floating upon an [[emerald]]-colored cloud, and a scripted box is discovered containing one of his most valuable possessions: his own Thousand-Mile [[Cloud]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a method of flight used by [[Jai Daishou]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Renfei]] has a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] preserved inside her armor.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] used the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to carry people.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is the foundation for [[Sky's Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a deep blue cloud.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Pai Ren uses a personal [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to fly.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn woman]] floats on an [[emerald]] [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|He'd found the scripted box that contained one of his most valuable possessions. His own [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Thousand-Mile Clouds are used by [[sacred artists]] to travel through the sky.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The Thousand-Mile [[Cloud]] is an [[emerald]] green object used by a [[Skysworn]] servant as a technique for flight. As a [[construct]], it can dissipate into [[essence]] of cloud madra if its core is struck, an event that occurred when [[Lindon]]'s version turned to mist. These giant golden entities are large enough to hold several houses and can bear a complex of palaces, such as the one hovering outside the [[Akura fortress]] where Sophara and her retinue resided in a silk tent. During a sudden movement like a storm's wind, a golden cloud was seen rushing over the edge of an [[island]], from which two [[Truegold]] [[dragons]] dropped.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a green object used by the [[Skysworn]] servant.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a technique used to fly.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a [[construct]] that dissipates into [[essence]] of cloud madra when its core is struck.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a golden cloud big enough to hold several houses.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]]'s [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] dissipated to mist.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a giant golden entity.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Sophara and her retinue were in a silk tent planted on a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a golden cloud that bears a complex of palaces and has hovered outside the [[Akura fortress]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is an [[emerald]] green floating entity.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a presence felt by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The gold [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is hovering over the edge of the [[island]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The golden [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] rushes in like a storm's wind.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Two [[Truegold]] [[dragons]] drop from the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Thousand-Mile [[Cloud]] is a type of green madra utilized to power various cloudships. While [[Lindon]] previously stored this substance within a box, [[Eithan]] demonstrates its utility by using a deep green variety to float. This [[madra]] can be summoned or dismissed through thought and may be contained within the back compartments of [[Skysworn armor]]. During their journey, the group carries Thousand-Mile Clouds stored within their emerald armor, which allows individuals to remain airborne. The substance's levitation properties are even potent enough to make an ornate table float.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a green madra used to power cloudships.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] once kept his [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] in a box.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] uses a deep green [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to float.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Skysworn armor]] can contain a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] in a compartment on the back.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Thousand-Mile Clouds can be summoned and dismissed at a thought.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The group has Thousand-Mile Clouds stored in their emerald armor.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Some individuals were in the air on Thousand-Mile Clouds.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] can make an ornate table float.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] stands on a platform supported by a violet [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Thousand-Mile Clouds are born naturally in the [[Ninecloud countryside]] and can be as large as islands.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a [[construct]] whose size remains constant for all participants.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A Thousand-Mile [[Cloud]] is a blue, possessable object that can be stood upon and is utilized by [[Lindon]] to see over crowds. While Underlords use these clouds to hover above arenas, [[Little Blue]] also employs them for flight. [[Lindon]] eventually utilizes a [[Skysworn]] version to fly and is later seen standing on a green Thousand-Mile [[Cloud]]. This green variation serves as a means of flight, which [[Lindon]] uses to drift back to his camp.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a technique used by [[Lindon]] to see over crowds.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a blue object that can be stood upon.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Thousand-Mile Clouds are used by Underlords to hover above the [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a type of cloud [[Little Blue]] uses to fly.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] uses a [[Skysworn]] [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to fly.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Thousand-Mile Clouds are items that can be possessed.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] stands on a green [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] used his [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to drift back to the camp.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] was using a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A green [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is used for flight.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A Thousand-Mile [[Cloud]] serves as a versatile flying transport that can function as a base for cloud-rafts. [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] utilized one to travel, while [[Ziel]] later relied on a borrowed cloud that remained as the last flying transport within his clan. During various movements, [[Akura clan]] [[Golds]] have been seen hovering atop these constructs or similar floating objects. In a moment of conflict, Fingers crashed into [[Lindon]]'s cloud as [[Yerin]] caught the edge where the [[madra]] was thinner. Additionally, [[Eithan]] Arelius has been observed resting upon a white Thousand-Mile [[Cloud]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] traveled with the help of a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Ziel]] travels on a borrowed [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] can act as a base for cloud-rafts.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura clan]] [[Golds]] hover on the back of a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] or other floating [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] rises on his [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Ziel]]'s [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] was the remaining flying transport in the clan.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] caught the edge of the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] where the [[madra]] was thinner.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Fingers crashed into [[Lindon]]'s [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] Arelius is resting on a white [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is rust-red.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] has a personal [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Thousand-Mile Clouds are used for transportation outside of the Valley.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] can summon a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] from his [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] can call a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] from her [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] leaped onto a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to fly.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] used his [[Hollow Domain]] to catch himself on his [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The newcomer flies in on a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] used a smaller [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to stabilize [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] is a common purple flying vehicle.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kelsa]] flies using a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“How many of you have Thousand-Mile Clouds?”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
